FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f5395287740>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T14:42:15Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T14:40:30Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T14:42:15Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T14:40:30Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036240477 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036349220 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036351714 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036383091 {

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036425205 if (!missing(height))

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036482315 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036484198 new$version <- version
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036503046 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036503507 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036528985 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036529756 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036547152 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036547924 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036561164 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036561935 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036571339 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036571799 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036581404 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036581845 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036601494 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036614869 if (!missing(useDingbats))

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036625931 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036648685 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036649116 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036658590 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036674404 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036687769 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036703292 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036713112 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036713833 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036725530 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036726001 "default"))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036736327 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036736767 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036746081 }
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036746742 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036756197 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036756687 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036773653 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036790658 }
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036791439 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036801965 }
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036802446 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036810909 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036811369 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036821064 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036821505 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036831700 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036832111 }
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036846112 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036847093 old$family <- family
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036863067 }

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036903057 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/11 14:43:54.036903518 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036924149 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/11 14:43:54.036961645 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
